title: Door Knocker [Updated]
description: This Mod Updates FroyoCS'S Mod From 1.18.1 To 1.20
body:
![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I10Q0gBD/images/8e1d63063cfa1fc4ff75891338e54f84a9b768fe.png)
This Mod Updates [FroyoCS'S](https://github.com/froyo4u/Door-Knocker 'Title') Mod From 1.18.1 To 1.20

This mod makes it so that when you hit a door or trapdoor, it plays a knocking sound.
